{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Five Sisters of the Iceflower Continent
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Five Sisters of the Iceflower Continent]] were scheduled for the next fight.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
